SEARCH
Package pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.rest

Class BuildingInfoController

java.lang.Object
pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.rest.BuildingInfoController
@RestController @RequestMapping("/api/building") public class BuildingInfoController extends Object
REST controller exposing the Building Info API.

All endpoints accept a Building as a JSON request body and return computed statistics in JSON format. The building structure mirrors the data model described in the project specification:

 {
   "id": 1, "name": "Main Building",
   "levels": [
     { "id": 10, "name": "Ground Floor",
       "rooms": [
         { "id": 101, "name": "Room A", "area": 30.0, "cube": 75.0,
           "heating": 1200.0, "light": 500.0 }
       ]
     }
   ]
 }

Base path: /api/building

    Description

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Map<String,Double>>
    getBuildingArea(Building building)
    Returns the total floor area of the building in m².
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Map<String,Double>>
    getBuildingCube(Building building)
    Returns the total volume (cubature) of the building in m³.
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Map<String,Double>>
    getBuildingHeatingPerCube(Building building)
    Returns the average heating energy consumption per m³ for the building.
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Map<String,Double>>
    getBuildingLightPerArea(Building building)
    Returns the average lighting power per m² for the building.
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Map<String,Double>>
    getLevelArea(int levelId, Building building)
    Returns the total floor area of a specific level in m².
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Map<String,Double>>
    getLevelCube(int levelId, Building building)
    Returns the total volume of a specific level in m³.
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Map<String,Double>>
    getLevelHeatingPerCube(int levelId, Building building)
    Returns the average heating per m³ for a specific level.
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Map<String,Double>>
    getLevelLightPerArea(int levelId, Building building)
    Returns the average lighting power per m² for a specific level.
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Map<String,Double>>
    getRoomArea(int roomId, Building building)
    Returns the floor area of a specific room in m².
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Map<String,Double>>
    getRoomCube(int roomId, Building building)
    Returns the volume of a specific room in m³.
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Map<String,Double>>
    getRoomHeatingPerCube(int roomId, Building building)
    Returns the heating per m³ for a specific room.
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Map<String,Double>>
    getRoomLightPerArea(int roomId, Building building)
    Returns the lighting power per m² for a specific room.
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<Room>>
    getRoomsExceedingHeating(double threshold, Building building)
    Returns all rooms whose heating per m³ exceeds the given threshold.

  • Method Details

    • getBuildingArea

      @PostMapping("/area") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Map<String,Double>> getBuildingArea(@RequestBody Building building)
      Returns the total floor area of the building in m².
      Parameters:
      building - the building structure in JSON
      Returns:
      JSON: {"area": <value>}

    • getBuildingCube

      @PostMapping("/cube") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Map<String,Double>> getBuildingCube(@RequestBody Building building)
      Returns the total volume (cubature) of the building in m³.
      Parameters:
      building - the building structure in JSON
      Returns:
      JSON: {"cube": <value>}

    • getBuildingLightPerArea

      @PostMapping("/light") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Map<String,Double>> getBuildingLightPerArea(@RequestBody Building building)
      Returns the average lighting power per m² for the building.
      Parameters:
      building - the building structure in JSON
      Returns:
      JSON: {"lightPerArea": <value>}

    • getBuildingHeatingPerCube

      @PostMapping("/heating") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Map<String,Double>> getBuildingHeatingPerCube(@RequestBody Building building)
      Returns the average heating energy consumption per m³ for the building.
      Parameters:
      building - the building structure in JSON
      Returns:
      JSON: {"heatingPerCube": <value>}

    • getRoomsExceedingHeating

      @PostMapping("/heating/exceeded") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<Room>> getRoomsExceedingHeating(@RequestParam double threshold, @RequestBody Building building)
      Returns all rooms whose heating per m³ exceeds the given threshold.
      Parameters:
      threshold - the limit value for heating per m³
      building - the building structure in JSON
      Returns:
      JSON array of room objects exceeding the threshold

    • getLevelArea

      @PostMapping("/level/{levelId}/area") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Map<String,Double>> getLevelArea(@PathVariable int levelId, @RequestBody Building building)
      Returns the total floor area of a specific level in m².
      Parameters:
      levelId - the id of the level to query
      building - the building structure in JSON
      Returns:
      JSON: {"area": <value>} or 404 if level not found

    • getLevelCube

      @PostMapping("/level/{levelId}/cube") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Map<String,Double>> getLevelCube(@PathVariable int levelId, @RequestBody Building building)
      Returns the total volume of a specific level in m³.
      Parameters:
      levelId - the id of the level to query
      building - the building structure in JSON
      Returns:
      JSON: {"cube": <value>} or 404 if level not found

    • getLevelLightPerArea

      @PostMapping("/level/{levelId}/light") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Map<String,Double>> getLevelLightPerArea(@PathVariable int levelId, @RequestBody Building building)
      Returns the average lighting power per m² for a specific level.

    • getLevelHeatingPerCube

      @PostMapping("/level/{levelId}/heating") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Map<String,Double>> getLevelHeatingPerCube(@PathVariable int levelId, @RequestBody Building building)
      Returns the average heating per m³ for a specific level.

    • getRoomArea

      @PostMapping("/room/{roomId}/area") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Map<String,Double>> getRoomArea(@PathVariable int roomId, @RequestBody Building building)
      Returns the floor area of a specific room in m².
      Parameters:
      roomId - the id of the room to query
      building - the building structure in JSON
      Returns:
      JSON: {"area": <value>} or 404 if room not found

    • getRoomCube

      @PostMapping("/room/{roomId}/cube") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Map<String,Double>> getRoomCube(@PathVariable int roomId, @RequestBody Building building)
      Returns the volume of a specific room in m³.

    • getRoomLightPerArea

      @PostMapping("/room/{roomId}/light") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Map<String,Double>> getRoomLightPerArea(@PathVariable int roomId, @RequestBody Building building)
      Returns the lighting power per m² for a specific room.

    • getRoomHeatingPerCube

      @PostMapping("/room/{roomId}/heating") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Map<String,Double>> getRoomHeatingPerCube(@PathVariable int roomId, @RequestBody Building building)
      Returns the heating per m³ for a specific room.
